task_prompt:
You are testing the slides MCP server. IMPORTANT: First use toolbelt_list_tools to discover available tools, then use toolbelt_add_tool to add each tool before using it.

After adding tools, execute ALL three steps:
1. create_deck with directory='/', file_name='test.pptx', slides=[{"layout": "title", "title": "Smoke Test"}]
2. read_completedeck with file_path='/test.pptx'
3. add_slide with file_path='/test.pptx', index=1

You MUST call all three tools above. Report results from each call.
